program: Stock Prediction System P3 Research Retrospective

stages.title: GBGF Framework Migration
stages.summary: Migrated GBGF from LotteryNew to Stock. No contamination. Smoke test passed.

stages.title: Synthetic Hypothesis Validation Pipeline
stages.summary: Built validation pipeline. 0/3 promoted on GBM noise - correctly avoided fake edge.

stages.title: Real Stock Data Adapter and PIT Guard
stages.summary: Built StockRealDomain and PointInTimeGuard. Full G01-G10 gates on 2330.

stages.title: Multi-Symbol Batch Validation H001-H003
stages.summary: H001-H003 no edge on real data across multiple symbols.

stages.title: V2 Hypotheses H004-H008
stages.summary: H004-H008 PIT-safe features. 124/124 tests pass. No edge found.

stages.title: Failed Hypothesis Diagnostics
stages.summary: H005/H002 have local observation value. H001 should retire. Signal sparse, universe insufficient.

stages.title: Controlled Refinement Plan and V3 Candidates
stages.summary: H009-H012 with anti-data-snooping guard. 89/89 tests pass.

stages.title: V3 Candidate Validation 8 Symbols
stages.summary: BH-FDR 0/32 pass. Review candidates 0. 8 symbols tested.

stages.title: Signal Coverage Audit
stages.summary: 1357 total symbols; 118 with ge500 rows; 112 stock-like. 8 tested = 3.5% of eligible. Recommended expand to 50.

stages.title: Expanded Universe Validation 50 Symbols
stages.summary: 50 symbols. 500d primary, 150d secondary. Primary BH-FDR 0/50 pass. Diagnostic BH-FDR 0/100 pass. H009/H010/H011 REJECTED. H012 OBSERVATION_ONLY.

key_conclusions: No edge found across H001-H012 in any configuration tested
No-edge is a valid scientific conclusion, not a failure
Positive ROI without permutation/BH-FDR support is NOT evidence of edge
Rule-based OHLCV threshold hypotheses cannot be refined further
The problem is hypothesis design, not pipeline quality
why_no_edge_is_valid: Consistent no-edge across expanding universe sizes (8 to 50 symbols) and three hypothesis refinement generations indicates genuine absence of exploitable edge in rule-based OHLCV patterns.
why_h001_h012_cannot_be_refined_further: Three refinement generations produced the same result. hypothesis_refinement_guard enforces MAX_CANDIDATE_COUNT=4. Further threshold adjustment is data snooping.
